steps.title: Use the given slope
steps.content: A slope of about $57$ means the model predicts $57$ additional beach visitors for each $1^\circ\text{C}$ increase in average temperature.

steps.title: Scale to five degrees
steps.content: For a $5^\circ\text{C}$ increase, multiply by $5$: $$ 57\cdot 5=285 $$ The answer is 285.
